title: 3rd Life+
description: Extra lives until you dies... Minecraft with three lives, and a TWIST! Introducing the Jagged Dagger, Golden Lives, Temporary Lives, the Reviver and MORE!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/303b82bd5836e34dc1b6d18b5fdfedb088c84f15.gif)
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ed85d0ad39b3057e1bbbcbe364634d74ea70847.png)
**You start with three lives and a green username, when you die, you lose one of your lives and your username turns yellow, if you die again, you lose another life and your username turns red, if you die a third time, your sent into spectator mode, thus killing you while still being able to spectate the world. use the new tools and lives to advance further and achieve immortality!**
![PageBlock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f39c278a2f72e0d6d50b7662aed40ec0e5795bfc.png)
![Temp Life](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/423404323006b44984a3f9dddd95a146179d2045.png)
The temporary life lasts for FIVE minutes, while it is activated it will grant you an extra life that acts just like a regular life, but if the timer runs out then it will go away and your lives will be normal again.
![Golden Life](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8dfaf0e2a047c23e91c641f704ae617d3503a231.png)
The golden life stacks over regular lives, effectively giving you extra stackable lives, only 3 can be applied on a player at a time, it is also immune to the jagged dagger.
![Jagged Dagger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c203d1755560bfac992b25dc585ea22169f798e9.png)
Right click the ground with this to take one of your own lives, or kill someone with it to take theirs, the lives are also named after the victim so you can add them to a collection. and lives can be used with a right click to be added to yours.
![Reviver1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ff5808e77d3de38db50c1a93826aa9efe350736.png)
With a reviver, all you gotta do is right click it while holding a golden life and it will fill up!
![Reviver2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e16cbc5bd876e301f23608cad16944d906b5a0ba.png)
![Reviver Gif](https://i.ibb.co/5974HWy/3rdlifedescription2copy2-ezgif-com-optimize-1.gif)

While in spectator mode, go to a filled reviver to be revived and get however many hearts that are currently in the reviver.
![Commands and Keys](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d690dc008b29cea067976ea3828b75d09db9d0e.png)

Hold down "I" to View your lives.

Press "O" to change your lives position

Type the command "/resetlives TARGET" to reset a target's lives.

Type the command "/addlives TARGET NUM" to give targets lives.

Type the command "/takelives TARGET NUM" to take target's lives.

Type the command "/setlives TARGET NUM" to set a certain number of lives for targets.
![Notes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/955262ff6bfb1a045f160dfc72980126b2532b12.png)
Please publish showcase videos as imbedded links in the comments!

**Don't  republish  my mod on another website  without  my permission _EVER!_**

Feel free to add to your mod packs - no credit needed, but i would like (if you're uploading it somewhere) for you to upload it to CurseForge or Modrinth!

Report problems in the issues tab [HERE](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/third-life-plus/issues)!
![name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a17d4571394b2171ab420266990936ca4962532.png)
